C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\ar.exe qc bin\libEGUI.a CMakeFiles/EGUI.dir/inc/EGUI/EGUI.button.cppm.obj CMakeFiles/EGUI.dir/inc/EGUI/EGUI.circle.cppm.obj CMakeFiles/EGUI.dir/inc/EGUI/EGUI.color.cppm.obj CMakeFiles/EGUI.dir/inc/EGUI/EGUI.cppm.obj CMakeFiles/EGUI.dir/inc/EGUI/EGUI.grid.cppm.obj CMakeFiles/EGUI.dir/inc/EGUI/EGUI.math.cppm.obj CMakeFiles/EGUI.dir/inc/EGUI/EGUI.panel.cppm.obj CMakeFiles/EGUI.dir/inc/EGUI/EGUI.rectangle.cppm.obj CMakeFiles/EGUI.dir/inc/EGUI/EGUI.shape.cppm.obj CMakeFiles/EGUI.dir/inc/EGUI/EGUI.slider.cppm.obj CMakeFiles/EGUI.dir/inc/EGUI/EGUI.text.cppm.obj CMakeFiles/EGUI.dir/inc/EGUI/EGUI.vector.cppm.obj CMakeFiles/EGUI.dir/inc/EGUI/EGUI.widget.cppm.obj CMakeFiles/EGUI.dir/inc/EGUI/EGUI.window.cppm.obj CMakeFiles/EGUI.dir/inc/EGUI/EGUI_base.cppm.obj
C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\ranlib.exe bin\libEGUI.a
